texto: Do you think the Devil is real then?” she asked. If God wasn’t up in heaven answering a desperate mother’s prayers then maybe Satan didn’t exist either.“He is real,” Gabriel answered quietly, his voice almost a whisper. “I look him in the eye every day.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Evangeline Ravencraft que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “Do you think the Devil is real then?” she asked. If God wasn’t up in heaven answering a desperate…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, devil, god, com foco em god e vampires.

frase_original: Do you think the Devil is real then?” she asked. If God wasn’t up in heaven answering a desperate mother’s prayers then maybe Satan didn’t exist either.“He is real,” Gabriel answered quietly, his voice almost a whisper. “I look him in the eye every day.
